name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Black, Latino Seniors in Virginia Get COVID-19 Vaccine Priority as White 85-Year-Olds Wait
body:
In a move that is outraging senior citizens throughout Virginia, the state is shifting its COVID-19 vaccination distribution to prioritize black and Latino residents even as desperate 85-year-olds interviewed by Judicial Watch struggle to get the shot.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | February 24, 2021
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53004&L=22203&F=H&)

# [Black, Latino Seniors in Virginia Get COVID-19 Vaccine Priority as White 85-Year-Olds Wait](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53004&L=22203&F=H&)
In a move that is outraging senior citizens throughout Virginia, the state is shifting its COVID-19 vaccination distribution to prioritize black and Latino residents even as desperate 85-year-olds interviewed by Judicial Watch struggle to get the shot. Like several other states, Virginia is vaccinating its population in phases, with healthcare personnel and residents of long-term care facilities receiving utmost priority. With that population completed, according to the Virginia Department of Health, the second group includes a peculiar combination of frontline workers, people 65 and over, those with medical conditions, incarcerated criminals and those living in homeless shelters or “migrant labor camps.”
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53004&L=22203&F=H&)

body:
| |
#
**Nina Ahmad: 28 years** **for a science Ph.D to turn to politics** **Thursday, February 14, 2021** _Nina Ahmad is a first-generation American, scientist, and former deputy mayor for public engagement for the City of Philadelphia. She received her doctorate in chemistry from the University of Pennsylvania and trained as apostdoctoral fellow in molecular genetics at Thomas Jefferson University._ Reflecting on the [over three million votes](https://act.myngp.com/el/DsQDLs_JtCTezd4DR8Fxo9cAds9ptFNDktMXV6vuTdE=/RX4Arl52ZBVhd39_0qFb1ZSzG_KXbp8TYeNnc6TbNxA=) I received in the 2020 general election for Pennsylvania auditor general, I am struck that this was more votes than trailblazers [Hillary Clinton](https://act.myngp.com/el/DsQDLs_JtCTezd4DR8Fxo9cAds9ptFNDktMXV6vuTdE=/_sQZ__9S_NlWh4UjYb1vxFXkH8eq3snNKjdesDUy_78=) and [Barack Obama](https://act.myngp.com/el/DsQDLs_JtCTezd4DR8Fxo9cAds9ptFNDktMXV6vuTdE=/4ffSYtwkw9C_d-3BlBIJ3HvhvE3K2X8bjx8bM3dcQ5o=) received in our state in 2016 and 2012. While I did not win that seat, I celebrate the cracks I made in that proverbial glass ceiling -- though it is perplexing we have yet to elect a woman of color to a statewide executive office. I am deeply grateful to Pennsylvania voters, especially those in Philadelphia, my hometown, who helped me amass more votes than any woman candidate for statewide office in our history. "I like to believe I've created cracks in politics' glass ceiling that are now ready to be shattered." **Nina Ahmad** READ FULL ARTICLE, CLICK: [https://www.inquirer.com/opinion/commentary/philadelphia-nina-ahmad-jamie-moyer-goals-advice-20210212.html](https://act.myngp.com/el/DsQDLs_JtCTezd4DR8Fxo9cAds9ptFNDktMXV6vuTdE=/_ghfVJWeYaM1o6Vv6PDgHmQRxN30BylJYhkuDFSQRfA=) Learn more by visiting our website: [**_www.NinaForPA.com_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/DsQDLs_JtCTezd4DR8Fxo9cAds9ptFNDktMXV6vuTdE=/vkOEUAQX-l7i4oM5BXSKf83ziQ8vMyTmXW8GYniijmU=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/DsQDLs_JtCTezd4DR8Fxo9cAds9ptFNDktMXV6vuTdE=/HYZ8T5saLCU1ZKexsVobRUxsjpK25Bb3FcUjMx73I9g=) Follow us on Social Media: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/DsQDLs_JtCTezd4DR8Fxo9cAds9ptFNDktMXV6vuTdE=/OymyfotMLNA9tpzRDHVLdcqg62oWmRCdOeAJ1tpSDxU=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/DsQDLs_JtCTezd4DR8Fxo9cAds9ptFNDktMXV6vuTdE=/De3caD3jXEqerDibG2jibAi2MbK2pVVFsd1oVpdCue0=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/DsQDLs_JtCTezd4DR8Fxo9cAds9ptFNDktMXV6vuTdE=/SLH5UjPHyf4ROsZal4qIEwb75A2CrPgED1lhy8OS9JU=?hl=en)

Friend,

As you may already know, the WVDP has already begun our Build Back Blue plan – an effort like never before to mobilize West Virginia Democrats.
We are currently in the polling/survey stage, and we need help funding. February’s fundraising numbers are $890 away from our end-of-month goal, and we only have until Sunday at midnight.

We can't continue like this. At the rate we're going, Joe Biden's far left agenda will transform every aspect of our lives

Friend,
We can't continue like this. At the rate we're going, Joe Biden's far left agenda will transform every aspect of our lives -- everything from our schools to our energy industry.__

We have to start working to take back the House. Without our majority in the House and Senate it is almost impossible to stop the Left's radical agenda.

name: Tim Scott
subject: There was no hope for my future
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
Socialism would have made my story impossible. Democrats are dangerously wrong on socialism. We cannot let them turn America into a socialist country and doom future generations to hopeless poverty.
Friend,

Democrats have socialism all wrong. They talk about socialism like it's just a philosophical conversation.

But I grew up in a single parent household. I grew up in poverty, _believing that there was no hope for my future. _That's what socialism sells.

**Friend, we have to push back on the false promise of socialism soon or we risk losing the American Dream for our children, grandchildren, and future generations.[ Will you help me stand up to the socialist Democrats?](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/stop-socialism/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210225_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1048967-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210225_there-was-no-hope-for-my-future/)**
[Stop Socialism](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/stop-socialism/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210225_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1048967-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210225_there-was-no-hope-for-my-future/)
---

It was only by the help of good role models and the grace of God that I was able to graduate high school, start a business, and live the American Dream.

Socialism would have made my story impossible. It's a system of hand outs, not hand ups. Socialism destroys the human spirit. It breeds hopelessness and it replaces equal opportunity with equal poverty.

Democrats are dangerously wrong on socialism. We cannot let them turn America into a socialist country and doom future generations to hopeless poverty.

[**Will you help me stop socialism in America?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/stop-socialism/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210225_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1048967-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210225_there-was-no-hope-for-my-future/)

Tim Scott
[Stop Socialism](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/stop-socialism/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210225_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1048967-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210225_there-was-no-hope-for-my-future/)

name: Young Kim
subject: I just got devastating news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
I just got devastating news. A dark-money Democrat group has plans to funnel $100,000,000 into battleground districts to maintain the House Majority. It's safe to say CA-39 will be a TOP TARGET.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014xwOyBOBB0N8UjW_yEU2Zy5ToGJYdipcJd1FKYH-auedFgfOvCPAiGiX-Wetkk49NzSPB91PpFt98VRA6AlIuAQEGw1-pjz5akW8vRM-b40mBHQidRcIjraEwcCydGT3LAjz3j6AjWMemJvRUzz9EMkhBqz6Qg1hQUyKzkaS2mpnyCqb5du06Vh0OEVizffj3fVGNc3KR0i2DQo-aY3vzkbEN9iYCBdkMuHfr53JFseHCMlKzZRi-dXVZ44kPQzRAvMSTU0UOY5f_cGuHZmsTedlSqpicuGTuRNdRXtRxuGdFIPIg8n1y8lnS7YzZ3RCKprjtitNUrA79ucS5pKuBna-yOf3wE2W_haz9T0L3-64aI2IGAyVXLvItR2-xvEFVYSgPNSDgyDKGDtoO3OmpgYRP_z0LLIHIE0wvzHgY-Bve5_uITAQRQ==&c=ReWJ7sMhTjsrI9ydqOWPJ1KxWrn86DTZ5f-hA5-pFaGm0qBZeUHBFQ==&ch=lHkv7SrY8GTHA919qPqRCQ05A4i4PeYIq3Kbg4VHbmg-t1p9NH7TuQ==)
---
Friend, I just got devastating news. A dark-money Democrat group announced its plans to funnel $100,000,000 into battleground districts to maintain the House Majority. **It 's safe to say CA-39 will be a TOP TARGET.** As you know, Friend, we are no stranger to the Left's attacks. In the last election, they spent upwards of **$20,000,000** to keep me out of office! But through grit, determination, and everyone doing their part, _we were able to defeat them._ This year is no different. Without sufficient resources, we will be DEFENSELESS. That's why I'm coming to you now asking for help prior to our end of month deadline. subject: That time Dems walked out on Indiana
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
It's been 10 years since Indiana Democrats walked out on Hoosiers. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470266?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3af61f897a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t
---
| Hoosier Republican,

This week, Hoosiers were reminded of an ignominious moment in Indiana politics. That time, 10 years ago, when Indiana Democrats walked out on their jobs, abandoned Hoosiers and fled to Illinois for a vacation right in the middle of session!

This Democrat temper-tantrum shut down the General Assembly for a month. While they took their vacation, the Democrats camped out off of I-74 in Urbana, IL holding all legislation hostage and making demands to radicalize our state with their far-left agenda.

Hoosiers had a nice way of thanking the Democrats for their childish walk out 10 years ago... by electing Republicans! In fact, since that walkout, your Indiana Republican Party now holds every statewide office in Indiana, super majorities in both houses of the legislature, 71 mayoral offices, and 88% of all county elected positions throughout the state.

With a winning streak like that, we’d encourage Democrats to walk about more! Of course, with super majorities in both houses, it wouldn’t slow down business.

The Indiana Republican Party is proud to be the party of freedom, law and order, and common sense in our state. We are dedicated to serving Hoosiers from Lake County to Vanderburgh County, and everywhere in-between.

Dedicated Hoosiers like Governor Holcomb, party leadership, and the entire Republican caucus continue to strive for providing the utmost constituent services and, above all, doing our job to serve YOU in the Indiana legislature.

\- Team Indiana GOP
---

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. clean_body: Republicans are already gearing up to win back GOP majorities in Congress in 2022 — and they have their eyes set on North Carolina. Help us stop them. | Hi, Peter! National Republicans have their eyes set on North Carolina — they know our state will be key to regaining control of the United States House and Senate. We can’t let that happen. We must work to help protect and expand the Democratic majorities in Congress by sending North Carolina Democrats to Washington in 2022. Earlier this week, we launched our Official Turn NC Blue Fund to help Democrats win in every corner of the state next year, and we need to hit our $17,000 online fundraising goal by Sunday to help us get started. So, what do you say? Will you chip in $10 or whatever can afford right now? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks! What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001skzh-zypqqLVYZD2oT4CuB6_EZLJqrWTgFTR_6_ecdknO060jtWl2IYaa1a2LNCeiLQJ6qIoe41F-p_HXu-fnBhW-ajJPm_HE14T2Z6Bcs59D1arYrZrJzgZ4WYUuyv0evSwf5uOxAY=&c=-XJIoUB9f81V97hqsd0DwjV9jgc-wr37LlskT-GuKmWDT2iDlQV1QQ==&ch=SUvUWQrroSu8lbIy5E3ksoF5gcXOROsh3lcfcTMws_Crtb6ls3WsPw==).

body:
The crazies in the Democratic party are running our government right now. With so much at stake we need to hear from President Trump.

Friend,

President Trump is giving a BIG speech this weekend. name: Andrew Garbarino
subject: ‘Closed’ signs everywhere you look
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS |
body:
It’s a disgrace what the Democrats have done to our small business community. And the situation is getting dire... [](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=0049e485c585487a893d504f53903b4f&_e=fUv38ywtHntljbik0MPCsd0U3qVMofaXEUnIWYDNnu0u13lIdd7FgiFYPhv3TZNcJCd-9mRAPLFCkvmkWNT0xQjAKLXIfULEzxYMA0MIrskj1FwarRLjsuu9AVORhS6aJVQAD8pL1PXA93OQm2pJ1I4I8E2jpvifJyqPjWZd5EgDKC9sps4BLlgl3oIfoLRVWa1-VV2egjaDlgs9e1-0auY5lpPAPn6DmImCvZnr_y_butzEsDC1R9oz74hG9h4Iz5uJv_KOZCFiw_FzQaBDwtXmXBlE8yUTltMY0FPwE6WQpsPywNU_XqbZGT6UxO5hEG1e3dX3DPSuGAnQMUyhumZN3QRAmt2xKT6ZE2NXu_lSTWzD8Swq_bf4xN20ZEE5LfHjegJYNfhr-mp_0rM8oorqB0OWPkfH-Mudee4_SdPtNX3-Ugx71phf_s5wgtjkwE35HpO2qZ3mldQ-KS3B0X-VifrNt31ItoMdSmWU5fFTWhVloqryTrfssjYJTFy4) | |
---
Hi Peter,

It’s Andrew Garbarino.

I don’t know how closely you've been following this, but the situation with small businesses is getting dire...

**In 2020 alone, over 100,000 small businesses closed forever, and we’re still losing 800 small businesses every day!**

This is an issue very near and dear to my heart. I may have to spend a lot of time in Washington right now because of my new job, but as you know I’m a small-town guy at heart.
When I walk the streets of my town on Long Island, I know our business owners by name. I know all about the problems they face every day - the issues they talk about at the kitchen table, the problems that keep them up at night. They’re my neighbors, my friends, and my family.

[](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=0049e485c585487a893d504f53903b4f&_e=fUv38ywtHntljbik0MPCsd0U3qVMofaXEUnIWYDNnu0u13lIdd7FgiFYPhv3TZNcJCd-9mRAPLFCkvmkWNT0xQjAKLXIfULEzxYMA0MIrskj1FwarRLjsuu9AVORhS6aJVQAD8pL1PXA93OQm2pJ1I4I8E2jpvifJyqPjWZd5EgDKC9sps4BLlgl3oIfoLRVWa1-VV2egjaDlgs9e1-0auY5lpPAPn6DmImCvZnr_y_butzEsDC1R9oz74hG9h4Iz5uJv_KOZCFiw_FzQaBDwtXmXBlE8yUTltMY0FPwE6VJMgnUXHpHQSNjYpyKmNBVOH_-eCJTjkkMFJAhe55_OC5QxiaEhszZLMvkOe_q0_rOvl0VGJro6VxmetLOradDAxuTda51IDWf4ib13A_3SS_Tb5U_eeTb04hLQ9EDhO9gy2wTDJDmFJMw_Bj1XEv3oUCIEelYBVH4SYMveOAhZMElfsII8q-wjMVtlWbwB1QLTb_nviGAhtXM42MQJ-Vy)
Unfortunately, our small businesses have been hung out to dry by politicians who have put politics over the people who elected them. Congress can’t continue to throw Main Street under the bus — **we need representatives who fight tooth and nail for small businesses on Capitol Hill, and that's what I'm doing every single day. **
[**SUPPORT MY FIGHT FOR MAIN STREET >>**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=0049e485c585487a893d504f53903b4f&_e=fUv38ywtHntljbik0MPCsd0U3qVMofaXEUnIWYDNnu0u13lIdd7FgiFYPhv3TZNcJCd-9mRAPLFCkvmkWNT0xQjAKLXIfULEzxYMA0MIrskj1FwarRLjsuu9AVORhS6aJVQAD8pL1PXA93OQm2pJ1I4I8E2jpvifJyqPjWZd5EgDKC9sps4BLlgl3oIfoLRVWa1-VV2egjaDlgs9e1-0auY5lpPAPn6DmImCvZnr_y_butzEsDC1R9oz74hG9h4Iz5uJv_KOZCFiw_FzQaBDwtXmXBlE8yUTltMY0FPwE6Wg301aCALWgFrC0BrHUr_OLdx0dJAVaFWgyRWf3L9yz1hJfbvb_G3lM7bowidwMCUnHIgPFSnVmQTi5JS9szcBaMhTzR_IZ2O6bPznVeAZHy5XDLUvfvJXyztadOC2FHGWe58agXIXlqSo5Pkffu-icZZc8PU8_giqpdoNeiV2iemh5BDUSuQRyDp0fEKcWxypEN57wMNrz8IdEeFwF1Wk)
Peter, it’s a disgrace what the Democrats have done to our small business community! Nearly ONE-THIRD of all New York small businesses closed during the pandemic. **These aren’t just stats on a sheet of paper. Every closed small business represents: **
** **
**➡ Dozens of Jobs Lost **
**➡ Generational Family Businesses Ended **
**➡ Communities Destroyed **
**➡ American Dreams Ended**

[](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=0049e485c585487a893d504f53903b4f&_e=fUv38ywtHntljbik0MPCsd0U3qVMofaXEUnIWYDNnu0u13lIdd7FgiFYPhv3TZNcJCd-9mRAPLFCkvmkWNT0xQjAKLXIfULEzxYMA0MIrskj1FwarRLjsuu9AVORhS6aJVQAD8pL1PXA93OQm2pJ1I4I8E2jpvifJyqPjWZd5EgDKC9sps4BLlgl3oIfoLRVWa1-VV2egjaDlgs9e1-0auY5lpPAPn6DmImCvZnr_y_butzEsDC1R9oz74hG9h4Iz5uJv_KOZCFiw_FzQaBDwtXmXBlE8yUTltMY0FPwE6WlrB5rRpbm6W7fIVh9qDE8qRAGcmra6_P42yy3RcKC9MGWxUnrtxWU06JHQKR3e1tX_AiI8m2A9YJd0Mxo1JVGWETvAq_9wi6yCJDilkDLDafRBydBC5qb9Ssv9RUv1SrYTIW-ahDOJ3H4-9QJ0-ryqtBbIxUrvlXVtsVNXHVvESq_oIDbxJ_fk0cPmRaeCIYZYm8Gk6WSMTOI64E2Y-il)
As you know, I come from a family of small business owners, and I’ve been working for small businesses most of my life. I know how hard it is to keep the lights on and the doors open. **That’s why it makes me so angry to see Democrats crush the businesses that are the very backbone and soul of our country with these unproven and unconstitutional lockdowns. **
And now that Democrats are in control of the White House and Congress, it’s more important than ever that we hold off the Left’s lockdowns and stand firm to save our small businesses.
** **
**We are the last line of defense for our small businesses and protecting the American Dream!**
** **
Democrats are pouring MILLIONS of dollars into small-town communities like ours to try to force their radical agenda on us! **That’s why I’ve put together the 🚨MAIN STREET DEFENSE FUND 🚨 to help Retake the Majority and support Republicans who will stand up for our small businesses!**
** **
**_[Peter, will you stand with me now and help defend small town communities like ours from Liberal Lockdowns and their attacks on our Small Businesses?](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=0049e485c585487a893d504f53903b4f&_e=fUv38ywtHntljbik0MPCsd0U3qVMofaXEUnIWYDNnu0u13lIdd7FgiFYPhv3TZNcJCd-9mRAPLFCkvmkWNT0xQjAKLXIfULEzxYMA0MIrskj1FwarRLjsuu9AVORhS6aJVQAD8pL1PXA93OQm2pJ1I4I8E2jpvifJyqPjWZd5EgDKC9sps4BLlgl3oIfoLRVWa1-VV2egjaDlgs9e1-0auY5lpPAPn6DmImCvZnr_y_butzEsDC1R9oz74hG9h4Iz5uJv_KOZCFiw_FzQaBDwtXmXBlE8yUTltMY0FPwE6UT8NfPX9iVvawdg4LWCn1qbthKbwwHDoGq-s1hIlEcsGsNEZovI6AvOchMYstITb2JTo9le3NBjVaXMSapw74sIJZ6Zp4XBwM9igwExJGR1mACaxOQq35xS8921o8LYOMfaDhvoIHko8xnvSMNdPMRKzy3dGnRVAxZ4hPbT8DUe1ZpNiDjRQ5IcmoiXHKRDvtzt2s2MV_1NiNR7f0CTHNF)_**
** **
Thank you,
Andrew Garbarino
---
---
| |
---
| PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS |
| P.O. Box 101, Bayport, NY 11705 |
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com |
| [Unsubscribe](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_s=0049e485c585487a893d504f53903b4f&_t=NiEdGBhkOYINL0UWW9h1MkZ8dqE29uxAXkABzjRm2873sbM66Rwbd_n4KuLbhV6tue9m0hZtQZNnZGYplIUItEtH_uhwps0SjNR6Kr8cWIocqLOCQiuwRXnl5GcT7aJvTGKKCCBSMPUY4dY_--fk3lRNCp8fHKKbwH3Vt1moMrU%3D) |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Outvote=20=28now=20Impactive=29?=
subject: We have a big announcement…
body:
Welcome to the future of organizing. | | | | [Trouble viewing this email? Click to view in browser](https://mailchi.mp/outvote.io/we-have-a-big-announcement-634996?e=0aad15100c)
---
| [ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=1f78f2de1f&e=0aad15100c)
---
| | Dear Outvote community,

When Outvote was founded in 2017, we never expected how much of an impact we could make in three years. It’s been an incredible journey, from our humble beginnings organizing for local city council races all the way to our massive successes in the 2020 election. Today, we’re thrilled to announce the next chapter of our story: **Outvote is now Impactive**.

We’re rebranding to make clear that our mission is to help any and all progressive social impact organizations and advocacy groups. We remain committed to our political and electoral work, and also look forward to welcoming many more nonprofit organizations, unions and others as Impactive partners.

We have a new name and a new look, and new features coming soon. Impactive partners will soon be able to send broadcast text messages to their supporter list, leverage two-click opt-in flows to grow text message subscribers, and track custom shortlinks across each of their actions. In addition, we’ll be adding functionality for users to contact their legislators, and will continue to invest in upgraded administrative features.

If you’re as excited by what comes next as we are, please [join our Impactive mailing list](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=4dade8e160&e=0aad15100c) for the latest on our new features and initiatives.

The fight for a more just society is never over, and we can’t wait to make even more of an impact (!) together.

Onward,
**Naseem Makiya
Founder & CEO, Impactive** _(formerly Outvote)_
---
| | | |
## [Join the Impactive Mailing List](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=1e488609eb&e=0aad15100c)
---
| | **Currently volunteering on Outvote?
Here’s what to do. **

The all-new Impactive app is your new home for volunteering. If you have the Outvote app downloaded on your phone, visit the App Store or Google Play Store to upgrade your app to the Impactive release.

[](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=b013c41974&e=0aad15100c) [](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=c05e2b6e8e&e=0aad15100c)

If you use Outvote on the web, you’ll visit [impactive.io](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=414844b71b&e=0aad15100c) instead of outvote.io. Don’t worry, if you forget our new URL, you’ll automatically be redirected from Outvote!
---
| |
## Any questions?
Check out our _[FAQ here](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=07e62fc4f8&e=0aad15100c)_ to get more information about creating a campaign on Impactive. With any other questions or feedback, feel free to reply to this email!

clean_body: Welcome to the future of organizing. | | | | | | | Dear Outvote community, When Outvote was founded in 2017, we never expected how much of an impact we could make in three years. It’s been an incredible journey, from our humble beginnings organizing for local city council races all the way to our massive successes in the 2020 election. Today, we’re thrilled to announce the next chapter of our story: Outvote is now Impactive. We’re rebranding to make clear that our mission is to help any and all progressive social impact organizations and advocacy groups. We remain committed to our political and electoral work, and also look forward to welcoming many more nonprofit organizations, unions and others as Impactive partners. We have a new name and a new look, and new features coming soon. Impactive partners will soon be able to send broadcast text messages to their supporter list, leverage two-click opt-in flows to grow text message subscribers, and track custom shortlinks across each of their actions. In addition, we’ll be adding functionality for users to contact their legislators, and will continue to invest in upgraded administrative features. If you’re as excited by what comes next as we are, please for the latest on our new features and initiatives. The fight for a more just society is never over, and we can’t wait to make even more of an impact (!) together. Onward, Naseem Makiya Founder & CEO, Impactive (formerly Outvote) | | | | | | Currently volunteering on Outvote? Here’s what to do. The all-new Impactive app is your new home for volunteering. If you have the Outvote app downloaded on your phone, visit the App Store or Google Play Store to upgrade your app to the Impactive release. If you use Outvote on the web, you’ll visit instead of outvote.io. Don’t worry, if you forget our new URL, you’ll automatically be redirected from Outvote! | | Any questions? Check out our to get more information about creating a campaign on Impactive. With any other questions or feedback, feel free to reply to this email! | | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | Copyright © 2021 Outvote, All rights reserved.

name: Roger Misso
subject: LAST CALL for TONIGHT: join Sen. Warnock, Rep. Sherrill, Rep. Lamb, & Sec. Murphy for a Salute to Service with Taking the Hill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking the Hill
body:
Peter,

_Thank you so much to all those who have already purchased a ticket to join us tonight. You don 't want to miss this one, so we're asking one last time:_

The veterans of Taking the Hill are proud to announce our first event of 2021: a _**[Salute to Service](https://act.myngp.com/el/S3u1-7kXmgPvDvK2sDVqeoAbkEhKFCtv1qAYVoRDeRM=/zVal-Yuz-P9VKojaopxmMDu6ciqQmeXtVKnVZ9pTBII=)**_ celebrating our 12 incredible victories in the US House and Senate last year!

We are honored to be joined by three outstanding guests: Sen. **Raphael Warnock** (D-GA), Rep. **Mikie Sherrill** (NJ-11), and Rep. **Conor Lamb** (PA-17). Our founder, 32nd Under Secretary of the Army and former Rep. **Patrick J. Murphy** , will also be with us to usher in a new year of victories for veterans and military families!

Our work to hold the House and expand our majority in the US Senate is already beginning. In order to succeed, we need to raise as much as we can for this event. [_**Will you purchase a ticket to help us guarantee veterans and military family members on the ballot win and bring integrity back to government? Click here to help us raise at least $10,000 to meet our goals!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/S3u1-7kXmgPvDvK2sDVqeoAbkEhKFCtv1qAYVoRDeRM=/zVal-Yuz-P9VKojaopxmMDu6ciqQmeXtVKnVZ9pTBII=)

[**Date: TONIGHT!
Time: 7:00 pm - 8:00 pm
Location: Zoom!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/S3u1-7kXmgPvDvK2sDVqeoAbkEhKFCtv1qAYVoRDeRM=/zVal-Yuz-P9VKojaopxmMDu6ciqQmeXtVKnVZ9pTBII=)

We can't wait to see you!

In solidarity,
Roger

Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/S3u1-7kXmgPvDvK2sDVqeoAbkEhKFCtv1qAYVoRDeRM=/VYgqWTEndAH474u2KMXd3CxRRhAFDIrvywfymlwbBO8=)
[@RogerMisso](https://act.myngp.com/el/S3u1-7kXmgPvDvK2sDVqeoAbkEhKFCtv1qAYVoRDeRM=/C4IP0Cqy2n1ZZmiXKbqEOrZN8UsYYBlZKHlgsR7ZmdI=)

Paid for by Taking the Hill
---
Taking the Hill
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/S3u1-7kXmgPvDvK2sDVqeoAbkEhKFCtv1qAYVoRDeRM=/xwf1uJv6DdR32R2V4PFOPWmQ7fODvvP2ofc2O5Asugo=).

| Dear Fellow American,

Judicial Watch continues to make history by fighting for the rule of law...for the American people's right to know...and for accountability from our government.
**That is why I ask you to **[**support Judicial Watch with your best tax-deductible contribution now.**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53020&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMjUxNzE2Mjg=)
**I especially hope you will **[**donate now**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53020&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMjUxNzE2Mjg=)** because **your support has a direct impact on our ability to stay on track with existing programs and expand into other key programs critical to our mission of fighting for the rule of law and open government.
With your [**best donation now**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53020&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMjUxNzE2Mjg=), Judicial Watch will:
* **Keep fighting to keep our elections honest;**

* **Keep digging into serious allegations of Biden family corruption and influence peddling;**

* **Keep fighting to shut down sanctuary cities;**

* **Keep fighting for accountability in Congress;**

* **Keep fighting to get to the truth about the Obama-Clinton scandals;**

* **And we will not give the Deep State a pass on its illegal secrecy.**

I hope these brief bullet points reminds you of how important our work continues to be as we confront dishonest politicians of _both_ political parties _and_ combat unlawful government secrecy. And I hope you realize that with [**your best donation now**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53020&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMjUxNzE2Mjg=) we will continue to have a high-level impact on the challenges to the rule of law that we are facing.
Since 1994, Judicial Watch has fought for accountability, the rule of law and the people's "right to know." We are independent of political parties. As our remarkable record shows, we are _best_ qualified to police our government and protect our constitutional system. _We rely on you_ , as we have always relied on the selfless support of patriotic Americans _to help give us the resources we need_.
Thank you for standing with us [**by making your best donation now**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53020&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMjUxNzE2Mjg=)!
Sincerely,
Tom Fitton President

body:
Iowa Farmers are still hurting and Nancy Pelosi isn't providing them relief |
---
| | Friend,

Senator Grassley has a way with words. Yesterday, he issued a "Hogwash Alert" on liberal efforts to block derecho relief for Iowa farmers.
---
| [ ](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=b99bceec67&e=d48ad6f8f4)
---
| I fought hard to get this amendment passed in the Agriculture Committee and it was the only bipartisan amendment added to the bill. I promised to deliver for our farmers in Congress and that's exactly what I'm doing.

Iowa farmers are still hurting. Nancy Pelosi and her liberal allies are spending nearly 2 trillion dollars on Democrat goodies instead of finding resources to support families impacted by these horrific storms.

Funding for abortions but not disaster relief? As Senator Grassley said, it's hogwash.

-Randy
---

body:
Normal people think law enforcement means enforcing the law. Joe Biden's White House thinks it means ignoring the law. [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=c7925130a2364826b530f1233efc8069&_e=h4sH1ptVrklAbCPCCv91hEfPrElYGqu3H_vSmfwpVfi6kHzj21hZWDdoKAYASZoLwPmsrpYBFc5MbZwap10DqcTndLaJYATQchB3lerfDg7YGD5laNzs6XsQS9sBe49n3A8h-ir6OFNiVA5x-n5h7A6YBmFUTF3cTxzo6P7xJS-1wil_NBoxfJVNf1j_Ab7fWddGHvwQXKQpCLughbMGoh0dzI-KksiVxfcIBM984KCw5tjtcrx1Mg5LxzYqvvwPxjb_b9dOS6a4rsk2FKU-t0IPoWd6a5xvFhEyqC-ZhQz1GUN_n9WYq_sfvtYdx24dGY8YqgGkVfhIPMoV4o2KtyUsvBYUFXqIdUQgOrNyrGg%3D) | |

Dear Peter,
Normal people think law enforcement means enforcing the law. **Joe Biden’s White House thinks it means ignoring the law.**

Normal people think illegal immigrants should be caught at our border and illegal entry should be prosecuted. **The Biden Administration’s nominee for Attorney General told me this week he “hadn’t thought” about whether illegal immigration should even be a crime.** And he refused to commit to prosecuting illegal border crossings!

Imagine if you told your boss you hadn’t given any thought to the most basic duties of your job. _**You’d be fired!**_ For Joe Biden, ignorance on immigration is a job qualification.

That’s because the Biden Administration is reportedly proposing re-organizing Immigrations and Customs Enforcement (ICE), in a move that would drastically cut down on deportations of illegal immigrants.

**The Biden Administration is considering amnesty for 11 million illegal immigrants, all while nearly 11 million Americans are out of work!**

He’s doing this out of spite for President Trump’s legacy of border enforcement. _**He couldn’t care less what it means for you. **_

Biden is not looking out for your job. He’s not promising to keep your community safe. He’s paying off the corporate special interests who demand cheap foreign labor and couldn’t care less about violent crime.

**My team has set a goal to raise $50,000 before the end of this month to show Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer that we have had enough - our country’s future is too important.** _We demand that our immigration laws be enforced._
[_**Help us reach our February goal >>>**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=c7925130a2364826b530f1233efc8069&_e=h4sH1ptVrklAbCPCCv91hLeviDxKoZzya68OzoKtzEkifKCMeG0zKTv8Sm8JKoJu691PSNaDqlBtAlrg8FQvw_tKtcgMl-7MvjYC43SpnVhtyKu1HV9OvtjgCVMbCHv0KifX75HkqaJ3e2-omy6gezbe6RxmfA1jzQmU3mwT6MXCfvrE-IExzEGUN0y4SsW2AMGohFN4WEacEEN5ehD2lUfjXtWQEADyc_ViywSSUJAy5vNCRapB2TI3eHq6JwNOWcKkBTVmjrCP166kHXWsTrvso_uqshR4dSqQwx93lCzbMRWzY1jbgWORVRtTk892lb16XlL5Q5K2Lcsz6fGD6xrxYhrKMTU79FuXm9zzGS_7ByshLN48QejIjBAL8cDx0_Gjz2RWH8LHUZftRb0gAA%3D%3D)
It’s not right to open our borders for illegal immigrants while American citizens are locked down in their own country.

**If we don’t stand up now, our borders will be overrun by a surge of illegal entries._I need your help in this fight!_**
[_**Donate NOW!**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=c7925130a2364826b530f1233efc8069&_e=h4sH1ptVrklAbCPCCv91hLeviDxKoZzya68OzoKtzEkifKCMeG0zKTv8Sm8JKoJu691PSNaDqlBtAlrg8FQvw_tKtcgMl-7MvjYC43SpnVhtyKu1HV9OvtjgCVMbCHv0KifX75HkqaJ3e2-omy6gezbe6RxmfA1jzQmU3mwT6MXCfvrE-IExzEGUN0y4SsW28B5quHeKao91SnczJ03z6wdYf0rwdWMvaUEoYBn6Q5zBCvYsZEuCRbXGWMiKjZzKCqVtjqYtcSZkK7JvAyHjlI_14JKXfumd3PB5xZoRLS16D7vDW1Z1L09qE2g0PoQsBfSb9bS7S1DMK4Vpasxpn-3LvkPLi7Qp11uRd3zbyrNHRAVAKmytY51pqUDr0cxiQyusbdOZEwkSpkgqaNkqYw%3D%3D)

Thank you,
Josh Hawley

subject: Free Speech Update: The Far-Left Wants to Control the Media!
body:
With one-party rule now in D.C., the far-left is trying to ban conservative media from being aired on TV. Are you kidding me? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us10.campaign-archive.com/?e=24057c0240&u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=51a63aaaab)
---
|
---
|
---
# Socialist Level Censorship!
Dear Peter,Just this week, several Democratic Members of Congress wrote a threatening letter to satellite and cable companies demanding to know whether they still plan to carry Fox News, OANN, and Newsmax on their tv offerings since they are “misinformation rumor mills” and “conspiracy theory hotbeds.”[Are you kidding me?](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=bdcbfb3121&e=24057c0240) (Click here to read the letter)As if the far-left’s efforts to silence free speech on social media is not enough, now radicals are trying to further tilt the mainstream media away from any news outlet that is not fully committed to pushing out liberal content.These far-left Members don’t want you to hear anything about conservative thoughts or ideas.Like Big Tech, these Members want to limit what type of information you can obtain, and curtail your free speech rights.Let’s call this what it is: censorship.Fortunately, my office and other state attorneys general are fighting back. We are weighing in against this blatant attempt to silence conservative media voices.[Will you join our efforts and help us fight back against big tech and far-left Members of Congress who want to restrict your capacity to listen to viewpoints of your choice?](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=4137b91cee&e=24057c0240)
[](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=0c7af0d8eb&e=24057c0240)
Keep the faith,Patrick MorriseyWest Virginia Attorney General

clean_body: With one-party rule now in D.C., the far-left is trying to ban conservative media from being aired on TV. Are you kidding me? | | | | | Socialist Level Censorship! Dear Peter,Just this week, several Democratic Members of Congress wrote a threatening letter to satellite and cable companies demanding to know whether they still plan to carry Fox News, OANN, and Newsmax on their tv offerings since they are “misinformation rumor mills” and “conspiracy theory hotbeds.” (Click here to read the letter)As if the far-left’s efforts to silence free speech on social media is not enough, now radicals are trying to further tilt the mainstream media away from any news outlet that is not fully committed to pushing out liberal content.These far-left Members don’t want you to hear anything about conservative thoughts or ideas.Like Big Tech, these Members want to limit what type of information you can obtain, and curtail your free speech rights.Let’s call this what it is: censorship.Fortunately, my office and other state attorneys general are fighting back. We are weighing in against this blatant attempt to silence conservative media voices. Keep the faith,Patrick MorriseyWest Virginia Attorney General | | | | | Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. | | | Copyright (C) 2021 Team Morrisey. Hi there, we wanted to make sure you saw this:
**CNN reported this week that Senator Hassan is "widely regarded as vulnerable," and that New Hampshire is on "the top of the list of potential Republican pickups in 2022."**
Republicans only need to flip ONE seat to take back the Senate -- and New Hampshire is going to be their top target. Mitch McConnell and the Koch network are already running attack ads against Maggie, and we're being outspent everywhere.
Our end-of-month deadline is just around the corner, and it's our final deadline before our FEC reports are due. If we show any signs of weakness now, it'll only invite more right-wing attacks.
